body.p: The File Browser Descriptor API enables complete customization of file type filtering in Web Author's file browser and upload dialogs through a unified descriptor-based approach.

section.title: Quick Start
API Reference
section.p: The file browser descriptor is a JSON object with the following structure:

row.entry: HTML accept attribute for native file upload dialogs. If undefined, no file type restriction is applied.
Whether to show the "All Files" option in the file browser dropdown. Defaults to true.
Array of filter configurations for this type. The first filter is considered the default.
Localized display text shown in the file browser dropdown for this filter.
Regular expression pattern as a string for filtering files. If null, no filtering is applied (shows all files within the type).

section.title: Use Cases
section.p: Add additional filter choices without removing defaults.
Remove the "All Files" option for specific types.
Completely replace the default filters for a type.

section.title: Validation
section.p: The API logs console warnings for common issues:

ul.li: descriptor must be an object: Provide valid descriptor object
descriptor.types must be an object: Ensure types property exists
invalid type configuration: Check type configuration structure
invalid filter configuration: Verify filter objects have required properties
invalid regex: Ensure regex strings are valid regular expressions

dlentry.dd: Check label, regex validity, type name, and console warnings.
Ensure allowAllFiles: false is set on the type configuration.
Ensure setFileBrowserDescriptor() is called after modifying the descriptor.
